title: Complexity, Profiling, Rendering Budgets, and Responsiveness
description: Optimization starts from intuition, solver and drawing time are combined, huge mazes freeze the event loop, and average latency hides stalls. Learners cumulatively produce representative performance and responsiveness report through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Derive time and space from cells, passages, frontier, item count, algorithm, and representation before measuring.
Measure generation, solving, state conversion, drawing, callback delay, startup, save, and package behavior separately.
Define response, animation, cancellation, and redraw budgets and report percentiles or worst representative stalls.
